name: ScIdsMadorGrpExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.scidsmadorgrpextr_TMP_final;WITH cte_csv AS (SELECT ACCT_NM,CLNT_NO,GRP_LEADER,ADDR_1,ADDR_2,ADDR_1_CITY,ADDR_1_ST_PROVINCE,ADDR_1_ZIP_POSTAL_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.scidsmadorgrpextr_TMP_csvIn),cte_stageVars AS (SELECT cte_csv.*,dbo.trim_default(CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(' ',GRP_LEADER)>0 THEN SUBSTRING(GRP_LEADER,1,CHARINDEX(' ',GRP_LEADER)-1) ELSE GRP_LEADER END) AS FNMStg,dbo.trim_default(CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(' ',GRP_LEADER)>0 THEN SUBSTRING(GRP_LEADER,CHARINDEX(' ',GRP_LEADER)+1,LEN(GRP_LEADER)-CHARINDEX(' ',GRP_LEADER)) ELSE '' END) AS LNMStg,REPLACE(ADDR_1_ZIP_POSTAL_CD,'-','') AS PostalStg FROM cte_csv),cte_transform AS (SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.Tax_Year}' AS TAX_YR,'@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}' AS SRC_SYS_CD,'@{pipeline().parameters.AsOfDtm}' AS AS_OF_DTM,dbo.trim_default(cte_stageVars.CLNT_NO) AS CLNT_NO,UPPER(cte_stageVars.FNMStg) AS GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM,'' AS GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT,UPPER(cte_stageVars.LNMStg) AS GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM,dbo.trim_default(UPPER(cte_stageVars.ADDR_1)) AS GRP_ADDR_LN_1,CASE WHEN cte_stageVars.ADDR_2 IS NULL OR LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(cte_stageVars.ADDR_2)))=0 THEN NULL ELSE dbo.trim_default(UPPER(cte_stageVars.ADDR_2)) END AS GRP_ADDR_LN_2,NULL AS GRP_ADDR_LN_3,dbo.trim_default(UPPER(cte_stageVars.ADDR_1_CITY)) AS GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM,SUBSTRING(cte_stageVars.ADDR_1_ZIP_POSTAL_CD,1,5) AS GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5,CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte_stageVars.PostalStg))>5 THEN dbo.trim_default(SUBSTRING(cte_stageVars.PostalStg,6,4)) ELSE NULL END AS GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4,CASE WHEN cte_stageVars.ADDR_1_ST_PROVINCE IS NULL OR LEN(dbo.trim_default(cte_stageVars.ADDR_1_ST_PROVINCE))=0 THEN '0' ELSE dbo.trim_default(UPPER(cte_stageVars.ADDR_1_ST_PROVINCE)) END AS GRP_ST_CD FROM cte_stageVars),cte_join AS (SELECT x.GRP_ID,t.TAX_YR,t.SRC_SYS_CD,t.AS_OF_DTM,x.GRP_NM,t.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM,t.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT,t.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM,t.GRP_ADDR_LN_1,t.GRP_ADDR_LN_2,t.GRP_ADDR_LN_3,t.GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM,t.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5,t.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4,t.GRP_ST_CD FROM cte_transform AS t LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.scidsmadorgrpextr_TMP_xref AS x ON t.CLNT_NO=x.CES_CLNT_ID) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.scidsmadorgrpextr_TMP_final FROM cte_join
